lines.english: Lesson 46
lines.chinese: 第46课
lines.raw: Lesson 46 | 第46课

lines.english: Do it yourself
lines.chinese: 自己动手
lines.raw: Do it yourself | 自己动手

lines.english: Did the writer repair his lawn mower in the end? Why/Why not?
lines.chinese: 作者最终修好了他的割草机吗？为什么/为什么不？
lines.raw: Did the writer repair his lawn mower in the end? Why/Why not? | 作者最终修好了他的割草机吗？为什么/为什么不？

lines.english: So great is our passion for doing things for ourselves,
lines.chinese: 我们自己动手做事情的热情如此高涨，
lines.raw: So great is our passion for doing things for ourselves, | 我们自己动手做事情的热情如此高涨，

lines.english: that we are becoming increasingly less dependent on specialized labour.
lines.chinese: 以至于我们对专业劳动的依赖越来越少。
lines.raw: that we are becoming increasingly less dependent on specialized labour. | 以至于我们对专业劳动的依赖越来越少。

lines.english: No one can plead ignorance of a subject any longer, for there are countless do-it-yourself publications.
lines.chinese: 任何人不能再声称对某事一无所知了，因为有无数的自己动手刊物。
lines.raw: No one can plead ignorance of a subject any longer, for there are countless do-it-yourself publications. | 任何人不能再声称对某事一无所知了，因为有无数的自己动手刊物。

lines.english: Armed with the right tools and materials, newlyweds gaily embark on the task of decorating their own homes.
lines.chinese: 新婚夫妇带着合适的工具和材料，愉快地着手装饰自己的家园。
lines.raw: Armed with the right tools and materials, newlyweds gaily embark on the task of decorating their own homes. | 新婚夫妇带着合适的工具和材料，愉快地着手装饰自己的家园。

lines.english: Men, particularly, spend hours of their leisure time installing their own fireplaces,
lines.chinese: 男人们，尤其是，花费数小时的闲暇时间安装自己的壁炉，
lines.raw: Men, particularly, spend hours of their leisure time installing their own fireplaces, | 男人们，尤其是，花费数小时的闲暇时间安装自己的壁炉，

lines.english: laying out their own gardens; building garages and making furniture.
lines.chinese: 布置自己的花园；建造车库和制作家具。
lines.raw: laying out their own gardens; building garages and making furniture. | 布置自己的花园；建造车库和制作家具。

lines.english: Some really keen enthusiasts go so far as to build their own computers.
lines.chinese: 一些真正热心的爱好者甚至自己组装电脑。
lines.raw: Some really keen enthusiasts go so far as to build their own computers. | 一些真正热心的爱好者甚至自己组装电脑。

lines.english: Shops cater for the do-it-yourself craze not only by running special advisory services for novices,
lines.chinese: 商店为了迎合这种自己动手热潮，不仅为新手提供专门的咨询服务，
lines.raw: Shops cater for the do-it-yourself craze not only by running special advisory services for novices, | 商店为了迎合这种自己动手热潮，不仅为新手提供专门的咨询服务，

lines.english: but by offering consumers bits and pieces which they can assemble at home.
lines.chinese: 而且还向消费者提供他们可以在家组装的零配件。
lines.raw: but by offering consumers bits and pieces which they can assemble at home. | 而且还向消费者提供他们可以在家组装的零配件。

lines.english: Such things provide an excellent outlet for pent up creative energy, but unfortunately not all of us are born handymen.
lines.chinese: 这样的事情为积压的创造性精力提供了很好的发泄途径，但不幸的是，我们并非所有人都是天生的巧匠。
lines.raw: Such things provide an excellent outlet for pent up creative energy, but unfortunately not all of us are born handymen. | 这样的事情为积压的创造性精力提供了很好的发泄途径，但不幸的是，我们并非所有人都是天生的巧匠。

lines.english: Some wives tend to believe that their husbands are infinitely resourceful and can fix anything.
lines.chinese: 一些妻子倾向于认为她们的丈夫足智多谋，什么都能修好。
lines.raw: Some wives tend to believe that their husbands are infinitely resourceful and can fix anything. | 一些妻子倾向于认为她们的丈夫足智多谋，什么都能修好。

lines.english: Even men who can hardly drive a nail in straight are supposed to be born electricians, carpenters, plumbers and mechanics.
lines.chinese: 即使那些连钉子都钉不直的男人，也被认为是天生的电工、木匠、水管工和机械师。
lines.raw: Even men who can hardly drive a nail in straight are supposed to be born electricians, carpenters, plumbers and mechanics. | 即使那些连钉子都钉不直的男人，也被认为是天生的电工、木匠、水管工和机械师。

lines.english: When lights fuse, furniture gets rickety, pipes get clogged, or vacuum cleaners fail to operate,
lines.chinese: 当灯泡烧坏、家具摇晃、管道堵塞或吸尘器无法工作时，
lines.raw: When lights fuse, furniture gets rickety, pipes get clogged, or vacuum cleaners fail to operate, | 当灯泡烧坏、家具摇晃、管道堵塞或吸尘器无法工作时，

lines.english: some women assume that their husbands will somehow put things right.
lines.chinese: 一些女人会认为她们的丈夫总会把事情弄好。
lines.raw: some women assume that their husbands will somehow put things right. | 一些女人会认为她们的丈夫总会把事情弄好。

lines.english: The worst thing about the do-it-yourself game is that sometimes even men live under the delusion that they can do anything,
lines.chinese: 自己动手游戏的糟糕之处在于，有时连男人也活在自己无所不能的错觉中，
lines.raw: The worst thing about the do-it-yourself game is that sometimes even men live under the delusion that they can do anything, | 自己动手游戏的糟糕之处在于，有时连男人也活在自己无所不能的错觉中，

lines.english: even when they have repeatedly been proved wrong.
lines.chinese: 即使他们一再被证明是错的。
lines.raw: even when they have repeatedly been proved wrong. | 即使他们一再被证明是错的。

lines.english: It is a question of pride as much as anything else.
lines.chinese: 这更多的是一个面子问题。
lines.raw: It is a question of pride as much as anything else. | 这更多的是一个面子问题。

lines.english: Last spring my wife suggested that I call in a man to look at our lawn mower.
lines.chinese: 去年春天，我妻子建议我请人来修理我们的割草机。
lines.raw: Last spring my wife suggested that I call in a man to look at our lawn mower. | 去年春天，我妻子建议我请人来修理我们的割草机。

lines.english: It had broken down the previous summer, and though I promised to repair it, I had never got round to it.
lines.chinese: 它在前一个夏天坏了，虽然我答应修理，但一直没空动手。
lines.raw: It had broken down the previous summer, and though I promised to repair it, I had never got round to it. | 它在前一个夏天坏了，虽然我答应修理，但一直没空动手。

lines.english: I would not hear of the suggestion and said that I would fix it myself.
lines.chinese: 我不听她的建议，说我会自己修好它。
lines.raw: I would not hear of the suggestion and said that I would fix it myself. | 我不听她的建议，说我会自己修好它。

lines.english: One Saturday afternoon, I hauled the machine into the garden and had a close look at it.
lines.chinese: 一个星期六下午，我把机器拖到花园里仔细查看。
lines.raw: One Saturday afternoon, I hauled the machine into the garden and had a close look at it. | 一个星期六下午，我把机器拖到花园里仔细查看。

lines.english: As far as I could see, it needed only a minor adjustment:
lines.chinese: 据我所见，它只需要做一些小调整：
lines.raw: As far as I could see, it needed only a minor adjustment: | 据我所见，它只需要做一些小调整：

lines.english: a turn of a screw here, a little tightening up there, a drop of oil and it would be as good as new.
lines.chinese: 这里拧一下螺丝，那里紧一紧，再滴一滴油，就会焕然一新。
lines.raw: a turn of a screw here, a little tightening up there, a drop of oil and it would be as good as new. | 这里拧一下螺丝，那里紧一紧，再滴一滴油，就会焕然一新。

lines.english: Inevitably the repair job was not quite so simple.
lines.chinese: 不可避免地，这项修理工作远没有那么简单。
lines.raw: Inevitably the repair job was not quite so simple. | 不可避免地，这项修理工作远没有那么简单。

lines.english: The mower firmly refused to mow, so I decided to dismantle it.
lines.chinese: 割草机坚决不肯割草，所以我决定把它拆开。
lines.raw: The mower firmly refused to mow, so I decided to dismantle it. | 割草机坚决不肯割草，所以我决定把它拆开。

lines.english: The garden was soon littered with chunks of metal which had once made up a lawn mower.
lines.chinese: 花园里很快就散落着曾经组成割草机的金属碎片。
lines.raw: The garden was soon littered with chunks of metal which had once made up a lawn mower. | 花园里很快就散落着曾经组成割草机的金属碎片。

lines.english: But I was extremely pleased with myself. I had traced the cause of the trouble.
lines.chinese: 但我对自己非常满意。我找到了故障的原因。
lines.raw: But I was extremely pleased with myself. I had traced the cause of the trouble. | 但我对自己非常满意。我找到了故障的原因。

lines.english: One of the links in the chain that drives the wheels had snapped.
lines.chinese: 驱动车轮的链条上的一环断裂了。
lines.raw: One of the links in the chain that drives the wheels had snapped. | 驱动车轮的链条上的一环断裂了。

lines.english: After buying a new chain I was faced with the insurmountable task of putting the confusing jigsaw puzzle together again.
lines.chinese: 买了一条新链条后，我面临着一项无法克服的任务：把这个令人困惑的拼图重新组装起来。
lines.raw: After buying a new chain I was faced with the insurmountable task of putting the confusing jigsaw puzzle together again. | 买了一条新链条后，我面临着一项无法克服的任务：把这个令人困惑的拼图重新组装起来。

lines.english: I was not surprised to find that the machine still refused to work after I had reassembled it,
lines.chinese: 我重新组装好机器后，发现它仍然无法工作，对此我并不感到惊讶，
lines.raw: I was not surprised to find that the machine still refused to work after I had reassembled it, | 我重新组装好机器后，发现它仍然无法工作，对此我并不感到惊讶，

lines.english: for the simple reason that I was left with several curiously shaped bits of metal which did not seem to fit anywhere.
lines.chinese: 理由很简单，我剩下了一些形状奇特的金属零件，似乎哪里也安不上。
lines.raw: for the simple reason that I was left with several curiously shaped bits of metal which did not seem to fit anywhere. | 理由很简单，我剩下了一些形状奇特的金属零件，似乎哪里也安不上。

lines.english: I gave up in despair.
lines.chinese: 我绝望地放弃了。
lines.raw: I gave up in despair. | 我绝望地放弃了。

lines.english: The weeks passed and the grass grew.
lines.chinese: 几周过去了，草长高了。
lines.raw: The weeks passed and the grass grew. | 几周过去了，草长高了。

lines.english: When my wife nagged me to do something about it,
lines.chinese: 当我妻子唠叨我该做些什么时，
lines.raw: When my wife nagged me to do something about it, | 当我妻子唠叨我该做些什么时，

lines.english: I told her that either I would have to buy a new mower or let the grass grow.
lines.chinese: 我告诉她，要么我买一台新割草机，要么就让草长着。
lines.raw: I told her that either I would have to buy a new mower or let the grass grow. | 我告诉她，要么我买一台新割草机，要么就让草长着。

lines.english: Needless to say our house is now surrounded by a jungle.
lines.chinese: 不用说，我们的房子现在被一片丛林包围着。
lines.raw: Needless to say our house is now surrounded by a jungle. | 不用说，我们的房子现在被一片丛林包围着。

lines.english: Buried somewhere in deep grass there is a rusting lawn mower which I have promised to repair one day.
lines.chinese: 某个地方，在深草丛中埋着一台生锈的割草机，我曾承诺有一天会把它修好。
lines.raw: Buried somewhere in deep grass there is a rusting lawn mower which I have promised to repair one day. | 某个地方，在深草丛中埋着一台生锈的割草机，我曾承诺有一天会把它修好。
